hooks.command: cd C:/Users/bobfe/gymie && npx vitest run lib/parseOpeningHours.test.ts 2>&1 || (echo '{"systemMessage": "❌ Tests failed — nothing pushed."}' && exit 0) && git add -A 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet && echo '{"systemMessage": "✅ Tests pass. No changes to push."}' || (F=$(git diff --cached --name-only | grep -vE '\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif|webp|ico|ttf|woff|woff2|eot|svg|csv)$' | grep -v 'package-lock'); N=$(echo "$F" | grep -c . || echo 0); A=$(echo "$F" | grep "^app/" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); C=$(echo "$F" | grep "^components/" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); L=$(echo "$F" | grep "^lib/" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ $((A+C+L)) -eq 0 ]; then P=chore:; elif [ "$L" -gt 0 ] && [ $((A+C)) -eq 0 ]; then P=refactor:; elif [ "$C" -gt 0 ] && [ "$A" -eq 0 ] && [ "$L" -eq 0 ]; then P=fix:; elif [ "$A" -gt 0 ] && [ "$L" -eq 0 ]; then P=feat:; elif [ "$L" -gt $((A+C)) ]; then P=refactor:; elif [ "$A" -gt 0 ]; then P=feat:; else P=fix:; fi; S=$(echo "$F" | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//' | sed 's/,/, /g'); [ "$N" -gt 3 ] && M="$P $S + $((N-3)) more" || M="$P $S"; git commit -m "$M" && git push && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"✅ Pushed: $M\"}" || echo '{"systemMessage": "❌ Commit/push failed."}'))
